name_cn:
Black Toothpick Grain/Gold
🌈VOLTAIRE BOX Shoulder Bag, a minimalist favorite that exudes a premium aesthetic! The oval shoulder bag shape has a vintage feel and is suitable for both handbag and shoulder carry! The flip-top clasp is novel~ It holds a phone with no pressure at all! This bag is amazing! It's the perfect blend of minimalism and vintage, perfectly embodying the modern elegance of YSL. The casual, simple design makes styling effortless and sophisticated~ LE CASSANDRE twist closure, with an adjustable and detachable rotating hook shoulder strap, creating a personalized look. The hardware design is truly stunning! Made of box leather with a fantastic texture~ The capacity is also quite substantial
Model: 787671【Genuine Leather】
Size: 25x15x5cm
